name: FetchConfigService
businessLogic: Retrieve RequestContext from SlotsDTO and log the org code.
Call ConfigService.getBodDateAsLocalDate(requestContext) to fetch the BOD date and populate a BusinessDateDTO.
Set the BOD_DATE slot on SlotsDTO with the populated BusinessDateDTO.
Retrieve the current command payload string and featureType from SlotsDTO.
If featureType is 'OpenAccount', deserialize the payload into AccountDTO; if accountOpeningDate is null, set it to the BOD date, serialize back, and update DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD on SlotsDTO.
If featureType is 'AccountClosure', deserialize the payload into AccountClosureDTO, set closureDate to the BOD date, serialize back, and update DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD on SlotsDTO.
If featureType is 'TDAccountPreClosure', deserialize the payload into TDAccountPreClosureDTO, set closureDate to the BOD date, serialize back, and update DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD on SlotsDTO.
Catch JacksonException and throw a RuntimeException if parsing of the command payload fails.
